howItWorks.intro: This water conservation calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Shower Savings
rules.explanation: Flow rate reduction times daily usage.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How much water does the average household use?
faq.a: About 300 gallons per day or 9,000 gallons per month.
Low-flow toilets, shorter showers, and efficient irrigation save the most.
